name: Soya Bean Pate
recipeInstructions:
1. Drain the beans and cover with fresh water. Bring to a boil.
2. Boil hard for 10 minutes, then reduce heat and cover. Simmer until tender (about 2 hours, depending on the age of the beans).
3. Drain and set aside.
4. When cooled, mash the pate.
5. Heat olive oil in a pan and saute onions until very soft (10 minutes).
6. Add the mashed soya beans to the pan.
7. Stir in tomato paste, black olives, parsley, salt (if necessary), and sesame seeds.
8. Spoon into a serving dish and chill for at least 30 minutes before serving.
9. Serve with crackers or toast sliced into fingers.
